description.from:
Deals 267*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+168.3% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec.
[God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.
description.to:
Deals 267*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ATK 168.3% Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times, and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec.

[God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

description.from:
Dashes behind the enemy and deals 233*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+146.9% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4 sec.
[God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied 500 higher.
description.to:
Dashes behind the enemy and deals 233*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ATK 146.9% Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec.

[God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied 600 higher.

description.from:
Deals 200*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+126% ATK Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 2 sec. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills.
[God's Proxy] : ATK increases by 264*(1+0.3*Skill Level), Attack Speed by 30%, Physical Evasion by 300, Normal Attack DMG by 150%, and Status Resistance by 600. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to:
Deals 200*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ATK126% Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 1 sec. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills.

[God's Proxy]: ATK increases by 264*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Normal Attack DMG increases by 100%. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from:
Magic DEF increases by 85*(1+0.3*Skill Level), and Magic Evasion increases by 250.
When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 30%, and damage taken is reduced by 30%.
description.to:
ATK increases by 135*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Magic Evasion increases by 360.

When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 20%, and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%.

dark.from: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.
On hit, reduces the target’s Physical DEF by 35% for 10 sec.
dark.to: On hit, increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec.

light.from: Reduces Physical DMG taken by 25% during the duration.
light.to: Physical Evasion increases by 600 for the duration..

dark.from: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 100% during the duration.
dark.to: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 34% for the duration.

light.from:
Physical Evasion increases by 150.
On evasion, restores 5% of Max HP. This effect can only trigger once every 3 sec.

dark.from: Damage taken from Heroes is reduced by 15%.
dark.to: On evasion, restores 6% of Max HP every 3 sec.

description.from: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times and is irremovable.
description.to: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 5 times and is irremovable.

dark.from: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to 80% of ATK. Applied at 160% against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
dark.to: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to 60% of ATK. Applied at 120% against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
